headline: FUTY Delivers 64% in Five Years While Charging Investors Next to Nothing
summary: Utilities have long been the portfolio’s boring backbone: predictable dividends, regulated cash flows, and a tendency to hold up when riskier assets sell off. Fidelity MSCI Utilities Index ETF (NYSEARCA:FUTY) packages that idea into a single fund at near-zero cost, but what investors actually own is more nuanced than the classic defensive utility story. What ... FUTY Delivers 64% in Five Years While Charging Investors Next to Nothing

headline: Why One Investor Keeps Buying This Nuclear ETF Every Month and Won’t Stop
summary: Every month, without checking the price first, one investor buys more shares of the VanEck Uranium and Nuclear ETF (NYSE:NLR). This isn’t because they think they can time the nuclear energy cycle perfectly, and it’s not because they have some edge on uranium spot prices. [keypoint] Instead, they do it because the structural case for ... Why One Investor Keeps Buying This Nuclear ETF Every Month and Won’t Stop

headline: Constellation Energy shares are trading higher after B of A Securities maintained its Buy rating on the stock and lowered its price target from $407 to $401.
summary: Constellation Energy shares are trading higher after B of A Securities maintained its Buy rating on the stock and lowered its price target from $407 to $401.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Constellation Energy, Lowers Price Target to $401
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Ross Fowler   maintains Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $407 to $401.
